feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: red string (leads me to the grave)
entry.summary:
Author: ActuallyNonsense

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,740Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 15

Summary: if this is a joke then thе punchline goesthe years fly fast and the days go slowthe string went slack, and with it, the quiet certainty that he was out there. you trace the scar on his jaw in your memory, the mop of dark curls frozen in a photograph — small remnants of a life you’ll never know.

entry.title: More to love
entry.summary:
Author: TalesfromtheTrying

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,903Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 38

Summary: This is a drabble/headcannon that I did in 30 minutes because I was procrastinating. Based on a half-cooked headcannon that I have. I make no apologies. After a lifetime of hard and cruel things, Jason Todd has a preference for soft things. Especially in the romance department.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Dear, Our Bleeding Hearts
entry.summary:
Author: Goshidori

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,529Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 10

Summary: A story. Isn't that what everyone wants? A story with a hero that has cool powers, someone that can swoop in and save the day. A story where everything turns out alright, where the bad guys get taken down, and the world is saved. That would be a beautiful story, wouldn't it? But that isn't this story. There is no hero, there are no lifelong friends that save the day, because people can't be trusted. No one can save you, but you. To rely on others to pull you from the depths of despair is foolish and naive, that was a lesson learned long ago. But you're already here, aren't you? So I suppose I can tell you this story, and let you learn for yourself just how cruel people can be. So, let's start from the beginning. [Gender-Neutral Reader, this story is for everyone!]

entry.title: HELP! Looking for fanfic
entry.summary:
Author: ladyohara

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 76Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Help! I'm looking for this fanfic I read last year---it's either a Jason or Dick pairing fic. I think the reader/OFC (can't remember if it's a reader insert or OC fic, sorry) is John Constantine's daughter, and she falls asleep a lot. The other YJ characters are there as well. Please help me. I'm losing my mind. I don't know if I made this fic up. Will delete once found. Thank you so much.

entry.title: Regrets do die hard
entry.summary:
Author: PlsGiveMeBFnamjoonChuseyo

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,825Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Soulmates do exist. And when they do find one another they experience severe head ache and witness eachothers memories and each others initials appear on their wrists. He never did want to find his soulmate. But he did. And.. maybe deep down he always wanted to find his soulmate. So when he did.. why did she run away? (1st part of the story is of Jason when he was Robin, 17-years-old. No sexual implications, obviously)(2nd part of the story is after jason resurrects. There will be more plot in this part!! And maybe smut idk)

entry.title: To Love Me Is To Suffer Me
entry.summary:
Author: listlessev

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,381Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: "is it possible not to see your face in everything I see." Mc (y/n) and Jason have a break up, and it's pretty bad for Mc they've been through a lot but this takes the cake. Navigate through their life as they deal with this break up. We're all mortal all this love, anger, and sadness has to go somewhere.

entry.title: Gotham Nights
entry.summary:
Author: goldbird_goldheart

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,733Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 17

Summary: You’re walking home late at night and get mugged. A certain red helmeted vigilante saves you and gets you to a hospital. When you wake up, the man that supposedly took you in sounds a bit familiar, but you’ve never seen him before.

entry.title: Two Birds
entry.summary:
Author: queen_of_morons

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,369Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: The Peregrine Project.A mission made to train a specialized individual to take down Robin.There are quite a few flaws in this system though. Firstly, the girl being trained is not ready to take down Robin. Secondly, she can't help but to become friends with that same Robin. Thirdly, she thinks she falls in love with that Robin.It's your mission to kill him but you love him.

entry.title: Velvet Crowbar
entry.summary:
Author: VenusCrytrap

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,020Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 880

Summary: The kid next door has it rough. There’s nothing much anyone can do about it in a place like the Narrows, but you lead with as much kindness as you can afford and try to make his life a little easier. He crushes on you the way a lot of kids do on their babysitter, but he’s too young and too scrawny. He fears you’ll never take him seriously. Life tears you apart, but when the universe puts you in his path years later, Jason thinks he may finally have a shot- even though you’re both a little different. And a little worse. (Or: Jason reunites with the babysitter he had a big fat crush on)

entry.title: Good Luck, Babe!
entry.summary:
Author: VenusCrytrap

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 168,760Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 3,340

Summary: A decade after washing out of your mask, you try to piece together a decent life as Bruce Wayne's only civillian adoptee. Your father believes that you deserve more than what the manor has to offer. If only his wards got the memo.

entry.title: Chase the Fox
entry.summary:
Author: Gendermessness

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,556Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 69

Summary: "Jason?" a voice suddenly calls out. His brothers freeze and stare towards the door. Soft footsteps pad closer, and a young man appears, clad in only a pair of boxers and a t-shirt that clearly doesn't belong to him. After two years of dating, you finally meet Jason’s brothers. At 4 in the morning. In your bathroom. Bleeding. To their surprise you take it in stride. You joke, you make hot beverages and Jason lets you openly shower him with affection. But what they don’t know is that you’re the rogue henchman Batman has been chasing for years. And the consequences of your secret is catching up to you and Jason

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 109,949Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 668

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: chlo_caineandabel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,128Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 12

Summary: What happens when a lonely girl and boys who's alone meet? They bond. Not because they only have each other, but because they don't understand one another. You were siting alone in the park with seventeen minutes left till midnight. Seventeen minutes left of your birthday. A slightly stale cupcake you received from the bakery that closed ten minutes ago sits beside you on the bench. The moon rolls about in the sky as it slowly takes its place in the dark canvas of the sky. Out of the silence of the night, you hear someone's voice. "What brings you out here so late at night?"

entry.title: Don’t act surprised when it barges in anyway
entry.summary:
Author: vanillameringuecookie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,234Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Working under a pseudonym as a burglar was supposed to be the easy way out of your miserable life. But in a twisted turn, tangled up with stuff you shouldn’t have ever messed with, Red Hood finds you.   That might be the worst thing that’s happened to you.
